title: Amtech P4465 900mm (36") Ribbed Spirit Level
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This 900mm (36") spirit level has heavy duty aluminium ribbed levels with two milled faces and 3 level vials (2 vertical and 1 horizontal) and comes with plastic end caps
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Delivers consistent results for repeat use
EASY TO USE: Simple setup and operation for beginners and professionals
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Level See more
